heading: Transferred
label: 364 to 365 Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 364, , , which authorized the legislature to provide for the exercise of zoning power in town sites, was transferred to , Public Lands, and was subsequently repealed by , , .act July 24, 1947, ch. 30561 Stat. 414section 738 of Title 43Pub.
